hero.title: The Minds Behind the Science
hero.subtitle: Our work is grounded in neuroscience, organizational psychology, and practical leadership expertise.

arnisa.name: Arnisa Aliqkaj
arnisa.bio: Arnisa is an Organizational and Social Psychologist with a specialization in Neuroleadership. She works with companies, donor organizations, and public institutions to strengthen leadership, organizational culture, and workplace wellbeing through structured, evidence-based interventions.

zanfina.name: Zanfina Raja
zanfina.bio: Psychologist and HR professional specializing in talent development, organizational culture, and workplace wellbeing. At Myelin OPS, she supports leadership initiatives and evidence based programs grounded in organizational psychology.

ardita.name: Ardita Shabani
ardita.bio: Ardita contributes to workplace and community wellbeing initiatives through research based program development and psychological support strategies. Her work focuses on emotional wellbeing, resilience, and strengthening supportive organizational environments.

cta.title: Partner with our experts
cta.subtitle: Ready to apply scientific rigor to your organizational challenges? Let's build a neuro-inclusive future together.
